title: Partition Array Into Two Arrays To Minimize Sum Difference
description: Split an array of length 2n into two arrays of exactly n elements and minimize the absolute difference of their sums. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int]. nums has even length 2n with 1 <= n <= 15; values are signed and |value|<=1e7.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
